decision_model.NO_GO: Required client evidence missing, failed, or unresolved high risk exists.
decision_model.CONDITIONAL_GO: Client evidence supports limited launch with explicit conditions and named approver acceptance.
decision_model.GO: All required client-specific evidence, compliance review, runtime proof, residual-risk acceptance, and named approval are verified.
